report: GPU Cracking Driver Reagent Matrix — Final Report

achievements: All 4 GPUs online (RTX 5070, Titan V, K80 die1, K80 die2)
K80 die2 recovered via PCIe bridge rescan (PLX PEX 8747)
vfio-pci bound to Titan V + K80 die1, nouveau on K80 die2
Ember + glowplug daemons running via systemd
SystemdTimeoutStartSec fixed 30→90s for K80 POST cycle
coralctl operational for device management
GK210 identity confirmed (SM 3.7, BOOT0=0x0f22d0a1)
FECS woke from PRI_FAULT to HALTED — PMC engine enable works
PMU sctl=0x00000000 — NO firmware security on Kepler (unsigned OK)
PIO firmware upload verified (GK110 IMEM readback 8/8 match)
VBIOS PROM read (129KB), DEVINIT partially interpreted (40 reg writes)
blocked_by: FECS halts at PC=0 — clocks not configured
GPCCS PRI_FAULT — GPC register space inaccessible without full init

achievements: 10 reagent templates created (nouveau, nvidia-390/418/470/510/535/open-535 × K80/Titan V)
3 Titan V nouveau mmiotrace captures (32K+ lines each, 7343 writes)
mmiotrace parser tool created (parse_mmiotrace.py)
Init recipe generator created (generate_titanv_recipe.py)
Capture orchestration script ready (run_reagent_capture.sh)
VM infrastructure verified (libvirt + cloud image available)
Pre-existing traces from /var/lib/coralreef/traces/ integrated
phase3_driver_reagent_matrix.key_finding: Nouveau traces contain 337 unique register writes but ZERO SEC2/ACR/FECS/GPCCS/PMU writes — nouveau cannot do authenticated boot on Volta.

achievements: ACR boot solver run against live Titan V — all 12 strategies attempted
Strategy 4 (sysmem ACR) reached furthest: SEC2 executed, ACR returned 0xdeada5a5 (failed sentinel)
Strategy 7 (mailbox command) achieved momentary FECS RUNNING state
Post-nouveau falcon state documented: all IMEM/DMEM zeroed on unbind
Hardware security barrier characterized: sctl=0x3000 on all falcons
Boot follower integration mapped: BootTrace::from_mmiotrace() + to_recipe() pipeline exists
phase4_titanv_acr.root_cause: SEC2 hardware security (sctl=0x3000) enforces signed-only execution. ACR payload authentication fails because WPR2 region setup and DMA descriptor layout don't match what the hardware expects.
blocked_by: Need closed-source driver mmiotrace to capture correct WPR2 programming sequence
Need ACR descriptor layout from proprietary driver init
Need to verify IOMMU DMA mapping matches BL DMEM descriptor expectations

k80_die1.sovereign_status: FECS upload works, clocks not configured

next_steps: 1. Run VM captures with nvidia-535 on Titan V — most likely to have cleanest SEC2/ACR init sequence
2. Parse captured mmiotrace through BootTrace::from_mmiotrace() and extract SEC2/WPR2/ACR recipe
3. Feed recipe into strategy_sysmem (strategy 4) — patch ACR descriptor and WPR2 register values
4. Run VM captures with nvidia-470 on K80 — fill DEVINIT opcode gaps (PLLs, clocks)
5. Complete K80 sovereign compute pipeline once clocks are configured
6. Compare driver versions (experienced traveling salesman) to find common ACR init pattern
